name: Klopsk w Smietanie (Meatballs with Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the crusts from the bread slices and soak them in milk in a small bowl.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the minced onion in butter until soft.
3. Combine the ground beef, lightly beaten egg yolks, soaked bread mixture, onion, dill, tarragon, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Mix well.
4. Beat the 2 egg whites until they hold soft peaks, then gently fold them into the beef mixture.
5. Form small balls from the beef mixture and sprinkle with flour.
6. Brown the meatballs in a large skillet using 1/4 cup butter over medium heat.
7. In another skillet, sauté 1/2 pound sliced mushrooms in 3 tablespoons of butter until browned.
8. Add the mushrooms to the meatballs and stir in 1 1/2 cups sour cream, coating the meatballs evenly.
9. Simmer the mixture partially covered over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
